title: Compress the ESG approach to one bullet
guidance: Reward the bullet that packs the most decision-relevant content into the fewest words and reads like a partner wrote it. Penalise padding, vagueness, or an AI 'feel'.

runner_input.instruction: Capture the essence of the material below in a single bullet for an IC slide.
runner_input.constraints: Output: exactly one markdown bullet (start with '- '). Max 30 words. No title, no second bullet.

source_blocks.text: LP question: Describe the firm's approach to ESG integration in the investment process, including exclusions and post-investment monitoring.

items: ESG screen applied at screening stage; hard exclusions: controversial weapons, thermal coal, tobacco
Every IC memo includes a one-page ESG section; material risks scored
Portfolio companies report 6 ESG KPIs annually; board-reviewed; no third-party assurance yet

rubric_notes: Should be honest that monitoring exists but KPIs are not third-party assured.
